headline: Why Labcorp (LH) Is Up 6.1% After FDA Approval, Medicare Coverage Of ColoSense At-Home Test
summary: Earlier this week, Labcorp announced the nationwide availability of ColoSense, the first FDA-approved RNA-based at-home colorectal cancer screening test, now covered for eligible Medicare and Medicare Advantage patients and aligned with major U.S. screening guidelines. The test’s combination of RNA biomarker detection for both cancer and advanced adenomas, plus a simplified at-home collection process, positions it as a potentially important addition to Labcorp’s colorectal screening...
